anti_ai_rules: Never start with 'In today's fast-paced digital world'
Never use 'I am excited to share'
Never use perfect bullet-point structure in every post
Occasionally use contractions and informal language
Include specific details like exact hours, numbers, frameworks
Keep it grounded and professional, aimed at fellow developers and founders
